title: Betrayed
desc: A true-crime series exploring cases where victims are deceived by trusted people, exposing betrayal, greed, and devastating crimes committed by those closest to them.

title: Blood Relatives
desc: This true-crime series delves into murder mysteries within families, where every suspect is related and dark secrets hide behind closed doors-because in these homes, blood ties run deep.

title: Haunted Towns
desc: A paranormal docuseries following investigators as they travel across America, uncovering chilling legends, eerie locations, and ghostly encounters in haunted towns.

title: True Conviction
desc: A true-crime series where prosecutors and investigators recount complex cases, showing how criminals are caught and justice is brought through persistence and determination.

title: Evil Lives Here
desc: A true-crime docuseries where relatives of criminals share harrowing stories, uncovering how shocking secrets, crimes, and betrayal destroyed lives from within families.

title: True Conviction
desc: A true-crime series where prosecutors and investigators recount complex cases, showing how criminals are caught and justice is brought through persistence and determination.

title: Shattered
desc: A true-crime series where survivors recount traumatic crimes, showing how tragedy shattered their lives while highlighting resilience and the journey toward healing.

title: Betrayed
desc: A true-crime series exploring cases where victims are deceived by trusted people, exposing betrayal, greed, and devastating crimes committed by those closest to them.

title: Who The (Bleep) Did I Marry?
desc: A true-crime docuseries where unsuspecting spouses uncover shocking truths about their partners, revealing betrayal, deception, and criminal double lives hidden in marriages.

title: Web Of Lies
desc: A docuseries exposing chilling crimes where the internet hides predators, exploring how lies, deceit, and digital connections lead to devastating real-life consequences.
